Class Student

java.lang.Object
users.User
users.Student
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Student extends User
Represents a bachelor student in the university system. Handles course registration, marks, transcript and GPA tracking.
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • viewCourses

      public void viewCourses()
      Prints all currently enrolled courses.

    • registerToCourse

      public void registerToCourse(Course course) throws CreditLimitExceededException
      Registers student to a course. Checks prerequisites and credit limit before enrolling.
      Throws:
      CreditLimitExceededException - if adding course exceeds 21 credits.

    • addMark

      public void addMark(Mark mark)
      Adds a mark to transcript and recalculates GPA.

    • viewTranscript

      public void viewTranscript()
      Prints the academic transcript.
